metadata.title: Kling 3.0 Motion Control - AI Video Generator | Marble AI
metadata.description: Kling 3.0 Motion Control by Kling AI. AI video motion model that transfers movement from reference videos to character images while preserving facial identity and expressions.

hero.title: Kling 3.0 Motion Control
hero.description: Kling AI's motion control model. Transfer movement from reference videos to character images while preserving facial identity and realistic motion dynamics.

introduce.title: About Kling 3.0 Motion Control
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Kling 3.0 Motion Control is Kling AI's advanced motion transfer model that transfers movement from reference videos to character images while preserving facial identity, expressions, and realistic motion dynamics.

items.title: Motion Transfer
items.description: Transfer movement from reference videos to character images seamlessly.

items.title: Facial Preservation
items.description: Maintain facial identity and expressions during motion transfer.

items.title: Realistic Dynamics
items.description: Natural and realistic motion dynamics in generated videos.

items.title: Character Animation
items.description: Animate static character images with dynamic movements.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Kling 3.0 Motion Control a leading motion transfer model.

items.title: Image To Video
items.description: Transform static character images into animated videos with motion transfer.

items.title: Reference Video
items.description: Use reference videos to guide motion and movement patterns.

items.title: Expression Control
items.description: Preserve and control facial expressions during animation.

items.title: Motion Dynamics
items.description: Realistic motion dynamics with natural movement physics.

items.title: 1080p HD Output
items.description: High-resolution video output up to 1080p with exceptional detail.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated videos.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about Kling 3.0 Motion Control.

items.title: What is Kling 3.0 Motion Control?
items.description: Kling 3.0 Motion Control is Kling AI's motion transfer model that transfers movement from reference videos to character images.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Kling 3.0 Motion Control specializes in Image To Video generation with motion transfer from reference videos.

items.title: Who created Kling 3.0 Motion Control?
items.description: Kling 3.0 Motion Control is created by Kling AI, a leading AI video generation company.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Kling 3.0 Motion Control excels at transferring motion while preserving facial identity and expressions.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All videos generated with Kling 3.0 Motion Control through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: How does motion transfer work?
items.description: Upload a character image and a reference video, and the model will animate the character with the reference video's movements.

cta.title: Ready to Try Kling 3.0 Motion Control?
cta.description: Experience Kling AI's motion transfer. Animate characters with realistic movements.
